creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166641
patch to fix, and update sysutils/jailutils

This patch obsoletes previous patch.
It also removes an extraneous / in MASTER_SITES that was
also present in the last version/revision.
Lastly; it does as described in the title - update to version 1.7

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
